title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Shadowfax - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Shadowfax - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Shadowfax. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Rajkot-based team.

About Shadowfax:
Shadowfax is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shadowfax!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
